title: pelargonium × brassicatum
intro: Pelargonium × brassicatum, also known as Rosy Geranium, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium tomentosum and Pelargonium capitatum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosy Geranium include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × brassicatum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
